name: Your Delivery Driver is a Glaceon! | Delivery Glaceon
description:
❄️ Glaceon – Premium Companion Series ❄️

Experience precision-crafted comfort inspired by one of the most elegant Eeveelutions ever documented.

Each Glaceon Companion Doll is meticulously engineered with:

  • Life-sized proportions based on verified humanoid Eeveelution data

  • Ultra-soft cryo-polymer exterior for realistic texture and temperature balance

  • Reinforced internal structure for durability and pose retention

  • Expressive facial sculpt designed to capture Glaceon’s signature calm, judgmental stare

Whether displayed, admired, or privately appreciated, Glaceon brings a quiet, composed presence into any space—cool, collected, and impeccably designed.

What’s Included:

  • Fully assembled companion unit

  • Protective packaging (discreet packaging optional, and strongly recommended)

  • Care and maintenance guide

  • Limited edition authenticity card

Important Notices & Terms of Service:

  • This product is intended for adult collectors only.

  • Manufacturer is not responsible for emotional attachment, regret, or sudden self-awareness.

  • Not suitable for public delivery locations without discretion enabled.

  • If your package is delivered by an actual Glaceon, please remain calm, sign promptly, and do not attempt to explain yourself.

  • Eye contact is optional but discouraged.

Price: $770 USD
Shipping: International (manufactured overseas; patience required)

Glaceon™ — Cold comfort. Warm mistakes.

❄️ (Original Artist is shoutingisfun on Twitter) ❄️
creator: Alburto_
